lyrics:
Fists clenched, veins tight
Dog's curled up, sleeping through the fight
Shouting at the screen, got my lines rehearsed
This world's a mess, I'm making it worse
Got my coffee, got my cause
Gotta take a stand, gotta drop my jaws
Pick a villain, pick a side
Who needs peace when hate's a ride

Is it power, is it fear
Is the noise all you can hear
Every fight, every flame
Does it make you feel the same

Living in an age of outrage
Every day's a brand-new war
Got my dog and my frustration
Who the hell am I yelling for
Living in an age of outrage
Flip the channel, fuel the fire
Take a stand, take a punch
Raise the stakes, Raise the choir
Belligerent

TV shouts, I shout back
Ain't nobody listening, that's a fact
Double tap, lock and load
Another hot take, another episode
Gotta fight, gotta win
Gotta sink my teeth into the spin
What's the point? Don't ask me
I just need an enemy

You scream, you shake your fist
But the world won't notice this
Dog don't care, TV lies
Does it matter? Do you mind

Living in an age of outrage
Every day's a brand-new war
Got my dog and my frustration
Who the hell am I yelling for
Living in an age of outrage
Flip the channel, fuel the fire
Take a stand, take a punch
Raise the stakes, raise the choir
Belligerent

Every war you start alone
Just a king without a throne
The fire burns, the fight is fun
But tell me, what have you won

Don't ask questions, don't slow down
Let's burn another city down
Got my dog, got my rage
Ain't no cure for this new age
Belligerent
Belligerent
Belligerent
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This track opens with a tense, anxious atmosphere, featuring a clean electric guitar and a forward, processed female vocal that feels restrained. The energy explodes into a driving, aggressive pop-punk chorus, defined by a wall of distorted guitars and a powerful, punchy rhythm section. The production is modern and dense, yet every element sits clearly in the mix, with the lead vocal cutting through the instrumental layers to maintain focus. The most definitive quality is the massive dynamic shift from the verse to the anthemic, shout-along chorus, which perfectly captures the song's frustrated and defiant feel.

review.review_text: Running at a punishing 172 BPM in B minor, 'Belligerent' earns its title: the verse simmers with a coiled, clean-guitar tension before the chorus detonates into full-band fury, and that dynamic whiplash is the whole point. The hook lands hard, and the lyric 'who the hell am I yelling for' does the song's real work, turning a rant about outrage culture back on the ranter with enough self-awareness to keep it from being preachy. At just over three minutes, 4Castle don't overstay their welcome, and the choir-punching sing-along on 'raise the stakes, raise the choir' is built for a crowd to throw back at the stage. A highlight.
anchors_used: lyric: 'who the hell am I yelling for'
lyric: 'raise the stakes, raise the choir'
